note: Per-seam mutation test-strength floors (mutants killed / mutants covered, integer percent). The test-efficacy gate (tempdoc 555 Pillar C) ratchets these UPWARD: a PR that lowers a seam below its floor fails unless a changeset covers it. Floors are grandfathered from the current measured strength and rebalanced upward via `--rebalance`. Seam ids match governance/logic-seams.v1.json.
